items.name: MyFrancLucifer "Strawberry Chocolate" Flap
items.description:
FrancLucifer's Monsieur/Mademoiselle Flap was originally designed back in 2021, also the first *single mesh accessory at FrancLucifer.
This is a special limited variation of the Flap, putting a unique twist with creativity.

Made to fit all essentials and worn on the left shoulder.

*This item is a Front Accessory.
*Blocky Body Bags are made to be Back Accessories, while Woman Body Bags are Front.

Modelled by FrancLucifer
Textured by Mewiry
